response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise, along with deep knowledge of scalable architectures and DevOps practices. His background in renewable energy-adjacent projects and energy data platforms demonstrates relevant industry exposure. However, his recent roles focus more on AI-agent infrastructure and direct mail automation, which may not fully align with the role's emphasis on energy consulting and renovation workflows.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Proven track record in scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong DevOps and cloud expertise (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (prefers MongoDB)
Recent work focuses more on AI-agent infrastructure than traditional energy/construction tech
Higher seniority level may lead to overqualification or misalignment with entry-level role expectations
